description: You are a hydrographic surveyor tasked with configuring a new set of Leading Lights (Range Lights) to mark a dredged approach channel in the Solent. Calculate the geodetic coordinates for two navigation aids and create a Bridge Command scenario at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/l) Leading Lights Setup/ to visualize them. The channel starts at 50.7000° N, 1.1000° W with an approach bearing of 315.0° True. The Front Light is located 1.0 nautical mile from the Start Point along the bearing, and the Rear Light is 1.5 nautical miles from the Start Point along the bearing (1 NM = 1852 meters). The scenario must include an environment.ini file (Setting="Solent", StartTime=12.0), an ownship.ini file placing the vessel at the Start Point heading 315, and an othership.ini file containing the Front Light (Object 0) and Rear Light (Object 1) using buoy or beacon models at the calculated decimal degree coordinates.
